summary: The user discussed the impact of recent subway closures on local businesses, expressing concern for those affected and a desire to support them. The conversation highlighted the challenges businesses face due to reduced foot traffic and the importance of community support during such disruptions.
facts: The user has been ordering takeout from their favorite restaurants and buying gifts from local shops to support local businesses during subway closures. The user has noticed a lot of subway closures in their area lately, which has made it difficult to get around. The user feels bad for local businesses affected by subway closures.
